top_signals.title: Pakistan Inflation Climbs as Iran War Drives Energy Costs
top_signals.summary: Pakistan’s inflation accelerated to the highest in two years as the war in the Middle East pushed up energy import costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Labour sheds union member support to Reform, poll shows
top_signals.summary: Trade union members are split between supporting Labour and Reform UK, a poll has found, reflecting the breakdown of Britain’s traditional voting patterns. A poll by JL Partners has suggested that support for the two parties from union members is tied at 28 per cent, with Labour dropping 20 percentage points in support since the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: U.S. Congress returns as GENIUS comments periods close, jobs report: Crypto Week Ahead
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
